name: aioeufyclean

metadata.name: aioeufyclean
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# aioeufyclean

This is a support library for controlling eufy robot vacuum cleaners over a local network connection.

This library is tested with a eufy Clean X8.

## Thanks

This wouldn't be possible without the work by Richard Mitchell (see https://github.com/mitchellrj/eufy_robovac) and its many forks. Thanks!

modules.name: aioeufyclean.eufy_cloud
documentation:
For obtaining a list of keys for controlling eufy devices.

This is only needed once, to get the initial key.

See https://github.com/markbajaj/eufy-device-id-python/blob/main/eufy_local_id_grabber/crypto.py

functions.name: aioeufyclean.eufy_cloud.get_cloud_vacuums
documentation: Login to Eufy and get the vacuum details.

modules.name: aioeufyclean.metadata
documentation: Metadata about eufyClean vacuums.

classes.name: aioeufyclean.exceptions.TuyaException
documentation: Base for Tuya exceptions.

classes.name: aioeufyclean.exceptions.InvalidKey
documentation: The local key is invalid.

classes.name: aioeufyclean.exceptions.InvalidMessage
documentation: The message received is invalid.

classes.name: aioeufyclean.exceptions.MessageDecodeFailed
documentation: The message received cannot be decoded as JSON.

classes.name: aioeufyclean.exceptions.ConnectionException
documentation: The socket connection failed.

classes.name: aioeufyclean.exceptions.ConnectionTimeoutException
documentation: The socket connection timed out.

classes.name: aioeufyclean.exceptions.RequestResponseCommandMismatch
documentation: The command in the response didn't match the one from the request.
